title: papaver lapeyrouseanum var. endressii
intro: Papaver lapeyrouseanum var. endressii is a variety of poppy, a flowering plant known for its vibrant orange-red petals and delicate, papery texture. The plant is used in herbal medicine, particularly for its sedative and analgesic properties, due to the presence of alkaloids such as papaverine and noscapine. The health benefits of Papaver lapeyrouseanum var. endressii include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating mild pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are said to promote a good night's sleep and ease muscle tension.
